name: IIT Goa – Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant – 4 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 4 Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant posts. Candidates with Bachelor’s Degree,Diploma, B.Tech/B.E. in relevant fields can apply online from 06 May 2026 to 29 May 2026 through the IIT Goa website, iitgoa.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max age 34 for Technical Superintendent, 27 for Administrative Assistant. Relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree (55% marks), Diploma in Electrical/Electronics & Communication/CSE/IT/ECE (60% marks), B.Tech/B.E. in relevant fields (60% marks)

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 4 & 6 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Goa Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Technology Goa Technical Superintendent (Electrical)
